demo.try_subtitle: Try the app with a 4-bench synthetic pit. No upload, no backend wait. Loads instantly from the CDN.

step1.title: Load Surfaces
step1.max_size: Maximum 500 MB per file. .stl and .xlsx files are excluded from the repository.
step1.plan_view_subtitle_2d: Deferred download: ~3 MB of JS. Only loads when you click.
step1.plan_view_no_data: Load surfaces to see the plan view
step1.view3d_subtitle: Deferred download: ~4 MB of JS + ~22 MB of assets (Workers, Widgets). Only loads when you click.
step1.view3d_no_data: Load surfaces to see the 3D view

step2.title: Define Sections
step2.next_disabled: Define at least one section to continue

landing.hero_subtitle: Compare 3D design surfaces vs real topography. Generate cross-sections, evaluate compliance against tolerances, and export professional reports. All in your browser.
landing.cta_note: No signup, no credit card, no installations
landing.feature1_desc: Detects benches, berms, face angles, inter-ramp and overall angles using RDP + Hungarian matching.
landing.feature2_desc: Immediate view of % COMPLIES / OUT OF TOLERANCE / NON-COMPLIANT per sector, parameter and bench.
landing.feature3_desc: CesiumJS for the terrain, Plotly for interactive profiles, Chart.js for the reports.
landing.feature4_desc: Formatted reports with tolerances, profiles, and compliance rows ready for engineering review.
landing.feature5_desc: Try it with a 4-bench synthetic pit instantly, no need to upload anything.
landing.feature6_desc: MIT license. Your data stays in your session. No hidden telemetry. Contribute on GitHub.
landing.how_subtitle: Four steps, from STL to Excel report
landing.step1_desc: Upload two 3D files (design and as-built topography) in STL, OBJ, PLY or DXF format.
landing.step2_desc: Automatic, manual, click on the map, or from a CSV/DXF file.
landing.step3_desc: The pipeline cuts, extracts parameters and compares them against your configurable tolerances.
landing.step4_desc: Profiles, compliance dashboard, filterable table, professional exports.
landing.bottom_cta_subtitle: Takes less than 30 seconds. No signup, no installations.
